intro: Build your pride, defend your territory, and conquer the animal kingdom.
description:
Step into the wild as a mighty lion in Lion Simulator RPG: Animal Battle Survival. Roam vast savannahs, hunt prey, and defend your territory against rival animals and fierce predators. Build your pride by recruiting and protecting lionesses, and lead them to dominance in a dangerous ecosystem.

Experience realistic survival mechanics—manage hunger, stamina, and health while navigating dynamic weather and challenging environments. Engage in epic battles with other animals, sharpen your skills, and rise through the ranks to become the ultimate alpha lion.

Key Features:
• Realistic lion behavior and survival dynamics.
• Explore diverse landscapes—from open plains to dense forests.
• Form and lead a pride to conquer rivals.
• Hunt a variety of prey using stealth and power.
• Dynamic day-night cycles and weather impact gameplay.

Are you ready to rule the animal kingdom and survive the wild?
